title: Shopify Store Setup & Optimization
shortDesc: Complete Shopify store design, setup, and optimization to turn visitors into customers.
detailedDesc: I'll help you launch or optimize your Shopify store. Whether you're starting fresh or improving an existing store, I handle everything from theme customization to mobile optimization — at a price that makes sense for small businesses.
included: Shopify store setup and theme customization
Professional store design matching your brand
bestFor: Startups & small businesses launching or redesigning their store

title: E-Commerce Analytics & Reporting
shortDesc: Setup proper tracking so you finally know what's working in your store.
detailedDesc: Most small stores have no idea where their customers come from or why they leave. I'll set up Google Analytics 4, conversion tracking, and build you a simple dashboard so you can start making data-informed decisions.
bestFor: Stores that want to understand their customers and stop guessing

title: Conversion Rate Optimization
shortDesc: Find and fix the friction points that are costing you sales.
detailedDesc: I'll audit your store, identify where customers are dropping off, and implement targeted improvements. I keep things honest — I'll tell you what I can realistically impact, and I'll track results transparently.
bestFor: Stores getting traffic but struggling to convert visitors to buyers

title: Consulting & Custom Development
shortDesc: Affordable hourly consulting or custom Shopify work for unique needs.
detailedDesc: Need something custom built, want advice on your tech stack, or need help with a specific Shopify problem? I offer flexible hourly consulting and custom development at rates designed for early-stage businesses.
included: Detailed documentation of all work done
bestFor: Businesses needing flexible, affordable technical help without long-term commitments
